commands.label: Run all tests (all browsers, headless)
commands.notes: Runs all 255 tests across Chromium, Firefox, WebKit, mobile-chrome, mobile-safari

commands.label: Run all tests with a visible browser window
commands.notes: Same as above but opens a real browser window so you can watch the tests execute

commands.label: Open interactive UI mode
commands.notes: Best for development — shows a side-by-side test picker, browser preview, and step-by-step trace

commands.label: Open the HTML report from the last run
commands.notes: Opens the Playwright HTML report in your browser; useful after a headless run

commands.label: Run on a specific browser only
Run a specific file on a specific browser (headed)
commands.notes: Useful for debugging a single test file in a real browser

commands.label: Run a single test by name
commands.example: npx playwright test --grep "language dropdown offers three language options"
commands.notes: Supports regex patterns for matching multiple tests by name

commands.label: Run visual regression tests
commands.notes: Compares current screenshots against stored baselines in tests/visual.spec.ts-snapshots/

commands.label: Regenerate visual snapshot baselines
commands.notes: Run this after intentional UI changes to accept the new appearance as the new baseline

commands.label: Run tests in debug mode
commands.notes: Opens Playwright Inspector — lets you step through each action one at a time

commands.label: Run tests with retries
commands.notes: Retries each failing test up to 2 times before marking it as failed

testFiles.description: Home page load, console errors, main content
About page load, console errors, main content
Contact form fields, validation, submit state
Events page load, console errors, main content
Portfolio page, book cover images and external links
Skip links, alt text, h1 count on all pages
Language switcher: button visibility, dropdown, EN/DE switch
Full-page screenshot comparison for all 5 pages (Chromium only)
